info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: This API is designed to manage and optimize the building and development processes of an ecommerce platform. It includes functionalities to handle products, orders, user accounts, inventory, and payment processing. Users can integrate this API to streamline their ecommerce operations and enhance customer experiences.

post.description: Creates a new user account in the system with the provided information.

500.description: Internal server error.

get.description: Fetches detailed information about a user by their unique ID.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the user.

500.description: Internal server error.

post.description: Adds a product to the user's shopping cart identified by the userId.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the user.

200.description: Item added to the cart successfully.

500.description: Internal server error.

get.description: Gets the current contents of the user's shopping cart.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the user.

404.description: Cart not found for the user.

500.description: Internal server error.

delete.description: Removes a product from the user's shopping cart by product ID.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the user.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the product to remove.

200.description: Item removed from the cart successfully.

500.description: Internal server error.

put.description: Updates the quantities of products in the user's shopping cart.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the user.

500.description: Internal server error.

get.description: Fetches information about a specific payment using its unique ID.

parameters.name: paymentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the payment transaction.

500.description: Internal server error.

post.description: Endpoint to handle payment webhooks and update payment status based on incoming data.

500.description: Internal server error.

post.description: This endpoint allows you to initiate a new payment. It requires a payment request payload containing necessary payment details.

500.description: Internal server error during payment processing.

get.description: Fetch a list of all available products in the catalog.

500.description: Internal server error when retrieving products.

post.description: Create a new product entry in the catalog.

example.name: New Product
example.description: A description of the new product.

500.description: Internal server error during product addition.

get.description: Fetch details of a specific product by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the product

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving the product.

get.description: Search for products with optional filters such as category, price range, pagination, and sorting.

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Unique request identifier

parameters.name: X-Client-Id
parameters.description: Client identifier for the request

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer token for authorization

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter products by category

parameters.name: minPrice
parameters.description: Minimum price filter

parameters.name: maxPrice
parameters.description: Maximum price filter

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Page size for pagination

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort results by

500.description: Internal server error during product search.

post.summary: Place an order for a user
post.description: This endpoint allows a user to place an order using their user ID.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID for whom the order is placed

500.description: Internal server error while placing the order.

get.description: Fetch the details of a specific order using its unique order ID.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Unique order ID

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving the order.

delete.description: Cancel an order by its unique order ID.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Unique order ID to cancel

500.description: Internal server error while cancelling the order.

get.summary: Retrieve orders for a specific user
get.description: Get a list of all orders placed by a specific user using their user ID.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID to fetch orders for

200.description: Orders retrieved successfully for the specified user.

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving user orders.

post.description: Create a new shipping address entry in the system.

500.description: Internal server error during address addition.

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the address to be updated.

requestBody.description: The details of the address to be updated.

400.description: Invalid address format or missing required fields.

404.description: Address not found with given addressId.

500.description: Internal server error while updating address.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the order to be tracked.

404.description: Order not found with given orderId.

500.description: Internal server error while fetching tracking information.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

gatewayResponse.description: The response message from the payment gateway.

transactionId.description: Unique identifier for the transaction from the payment processor.

status.description: The current status of the payment.

totalAmount.description: The total cost of the order before discounts.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the order was created.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

currency.description: Currency code for the order amounts.

userId.description: The ID of the user who placed the order.

items.description: A list of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: The final amount to be paid after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the order status was last updated.

country.description: Country of residence of the user.

createdAt.description: Date and time when the user account was created.

preferredCurrency.description: The currency preferred by the user for transactions.

active.description: Indicates if the user's account is active.

userType.description: Type of user (e.g., regular, admin, etc.).

updatedAt.description: The last time user information was updated.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product ordered.

discount.description: Discount applied to the product's price.

finalPrice.description: Final price after applying the discount.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart.

discount.description: Discount applied to the product's price in the cart.

finalPrice.description: Final price of product after discount.

currency.description: Currency code for the product's price.

lastUpdated.description: The date and time when the tracking information was last updated.

orderId.description: Identifier for the order being tracked.

courierPartner.description: The name of the courier service handling the delivery.

trackingId.description: Unique identifier for tracking the shipment.

totalAmount.description: Total price of all items in the cart before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to items in the cart.

currency.description: Currency code for the cart amounts.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns the cart.

items.description: List of items in the cart.

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts.

updatedAt.description: The last time the cart was updated.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the address was created.

phone.description: Contact phone number for the address.

addressType.description: Type of address, e.g., home, office.

name.description: Name of the person at this address.

state.description: State or region of the address.

userId.description: ID of the user this address belongs to.

updatedAt.description: The last time the address was updated.

active.description: Indicates whether the user's account should be active.

userType.description: The role or type of user.

createdAt.description: Date and time when the product was created.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product.

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price.

category.description: Category to which the product belongs.

stock.description: Number of units available in stock.

updatedAt.description: Date and time when product information was last updated.

rating.description: Initial average or estimated rating value for the product.

available.description: Indicates availability status of the product.

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation.

currency.description: Currency code for setting the product price.

stock.description: Proposed stock count for the product.

brand.description: Brand name associated with the product.

quantity.description: The number of units to add or remove in the cart.

productId.description: The unique identifier of the product to update in the cart.

amount.description: The total amount to be processed for payment.

orderId.description: The unique identifier for the order associated with the payment.

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment to be used (e.g., 'credit_card', 'paypal').

currency.description: The currency in which the payment is to be processed.

paymentGateway.description: The name or type of payment gateway to use for processing.

pincode.description: The postal code for the address.

addressType.description: Type of the address, such as 'home' or 'office'.

name.description: Name of the recipient at this address.

state.description: State or region of the address.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this address.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the payment record was created.

amount.description: The total amount of the payment.

orderId.description: The order identifier associated with this payment.

paymentId.description: The unique identifier for the payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: The method used to make the payment.

currency.description: Currency code in which the payment was made.

transactionId.description: The transaction ID provided by the payment gateway.

status.description: The status of the payment transaction.
